name: craftastudio
description: Root workspace runner for CraftaStudio — frontend + backend + agents

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,backend,agents" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "uvicorn main:app --reload --app-dir agents"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && pip install -r agents/requirements.txt
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix frontend && npm run type-check --prefix backend
